title: The Fellowship
description: Adding Furniture, Voice-Chat, Controller Compatibility, and Performance Enhancements, while staying true to the Vanilla experience!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bad2577f764101bbd52d0a8dc830d6c7978dc007_0.webp)

The Fellowship modpack is intended for a Vanilla style Minecraft with a few extras.

The goal of this modpack is to add some furniture to Minecraft, include some performance tweaks, and add some shop functionality! In addition, it allows conroller functionality for those who perfer to game with their Xbox or other game controller.
Add a little dash of some additional animations, and you've got an enhanced vanilla-esk experience ready to invite some friends to join!



**Mods:**

- Roughly Enough Items
- Simply Voice Chat
- Controlify
- Not Enough Animations
- Universal Shops
- Paladin's Furniture Mod
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Mr.Crayfish Furniture Mod
